title: Molecular furnace
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:WorldDevastator-HBDE.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The molecular furnace of a World Devastator]]
A '''molecular furnace''' was a device that consumed material, broke down its physical structure, and used it to create new substances.

==History==
Molecular furnaces had been in use in [[mining droid]]s for at least several centuries before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], and was also used in [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[EVS Construction Droid|construction droids]]. [[Umak Leth]] designed a new type that became the basis for the [[World Devastator]].
